author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: 5 end-to-end training experiments all passing on CPU: (1) MLP with CrossEntropy+Adam, (2) Transformer with attention+LayerNorm+MLP+AdamW, (3) CNN with Conv2d+AvgPool+Adam, (4) LSTM language model with Embedding+LSTM+Adam, (5) VAE with reparameterization trick+sigmoid+KL divergence+Adam. All verify loss decreases over 10 training steps.
